title: podman_tutorial: Add latest tag in sample code
body:
Without this tag, podman returns:
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/f26/httpd...Failed
unable to find image: unable to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/f26/httpd

After adding the tag ":latest", podman managed to download and run the
container.

Signed-off-by: Marcos Paulo de Souza <marcos.souza.org@gmail.com>

comments.body:
This looks like it should work without the tag...

@baude Could this be a bug in the image code?

@mheon weird... for the third time it worked, I can't reproduce the problem anymore...

Tried to remove the image and all the created containers, and download the image again without the latest tag, and it worked... am I missing something?
no, it should work ... could be a glitch on the registry side temporarily.
Ok lets close this until you are able to reproduce.
